candidate_llm_application: DERVISH-RING: multi-layer phase-coherent activation steering via fixed-pivot rotation with calibrated layer-wise angular progression

independent_scores.title: Angular Steering Behavior Control Rotation in Activation Space
independent_scores.func_cluster: Angular Steering: bounded-angle rotation in fixed 2D activation subspace
independent_scores.reason: Core mechanism (angle rotation in fixed activation subspace) is exact twin of DERVISH-RING per-layer rotation; only differs by being single-layer.

independent_scores.title: Spherical Steering Geometry-Aware Activation Rotation
independent_scores.func_cluster: Spherical Steering: geometry-aware rotation + vMF gating
independent_scores.reason: Training-free geometry-aware activation rotation is direct functional twin of fixed-pivot rotation steering.

independent_scores.title: Selective Steering Norm-Preserving Discriminative Layer Selection
independent_scores.func_cluster: Multi-layer norm-preserving steering with layer selection
independent_scores.reason: Norm-preserving multi-layer steering covers (a) multi-layer + (b) calibrated layer-wise selection of DERVISH-RING.

independent_scores.title: LayerNavigator Finding Promising Intervention Layers
independent_scores.reason: Layer-selection for activation steering covers calibrated layer-wise progression aspect of DERVISH-RING.

independent_scores.title: Steer Like the LLM PSR
independent_scores.reason: Token/layer-specific calibrated steering coefficients are functional analog of layer-wise theta progression.

independent_scores.title: Local Linearity of LLMs Steering Linear Optimal Control
independent_scores.func_cluster: Linear optimal control multi-layer activation steering
independent_scores.reason: Model-based optimal control across layers for steering directly covers calibrated cross-layer steering.

independent_scores.title: Guiding Giants Lightweight Controllers Weighted Activation Steering
independent_scores.func_cluster: Weighted multi-vector activation steering with controllers
independent_scores.reason: Weighted multi-vector controllers cover calibrated per-layer steering magnitude/angle progression.

independent_scores.title: From Steering Vectors to Conceptors and Beyond
independent_scores.reason: Compositional affine conceptors generalize multi-layer rotational/projective steering — covers DERVISH-RING mechanism.

verdict_reason: Total hits = 8 (>=1). All 8 results trigger hit via all three modalities (kw>=2, sem>=0.7, func>=0.7). Angular Steering (2510.26243) and Spherical Steering (2602.08169) are exact functional twins of fixed-pivot activation rotation; Selective Steering (2601.19375) and LayerNavigator cover multi-layer calibrated layer-wise progression; Conceptors and PSR cover compositional/calibrated steering. DERVISH-RING is a recombination of well-covered prior art and not novel.
agreement_with_prior_scorers: Verifier independently confirms semantic and functional hits as reported by 06_5 and 06_7. Independent func scores within +-0.04 of prior judge. No disagreement on hit/no-hit classifications.
